message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in allocator_analysis.zig

Long-term fix: Made exprHasNestedCall and stmtHasNestedCall
comprehensive for all expression/statement types.

exprHasNestedCall added:
- keyword_args in calls, boolop, if_expr, dict
- subscript slice step handling
- fstring, listcomp, dictcomp, genexp
- lambda, starred

stmtHasNestedCall added:
- aug_assign handling
- for/while orelse_body
- try_stmt else_body and finalbody

This ensures proper allocator analysis when nested class calls
appear in complex expressions.
